description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a two-tone finish: a dark, wood-grain top and a lighter, distressed body. The front showcases six drawers arranged in two rows, each adorned with ornate handles and decorative carved motifs, including floral accents and a central medallion. The legs are gently curved, adding an elegant touch to the overall silhouette. The sides are framed with subtle paneling, while the back is constructed from a simpler, flat wood panel. The handles are traditional bail pulls, and the drawers appear spacious, suitable for storing clothing or household items. The overall craftsmanship suggests a sturdy, solid wood construction, ideal for both decorative and functional use in an urban environment.
description: A vintage-style chest of drawers with a dark wood top, light distressed body, ornate handles, and decorative carvings. It features six spacious drawers and elegant curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with ornate handles and decorative carvings, highlighting the chest's detailed facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood paneling and the depth of the chest, with curved legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, flat wood panel back with a darker finish and no decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the paneling and curved leg detail.
